mapper.insert: INSERT INTO posts(author_id, title, content) VALUES (#{authorId}, #{title}, #{content})
mapper.sql: p.post_id, p.author_id, u.name AS author_name, p.title, p.content, p.view_count, p.created_at, p.updated_at

where.if: AND (p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

mapper.delete: DELETE FROM posts WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND author_id = #{authorId}
mapper.update: UPDATE posts SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE post_id = #{postId}
